sourcesContent:
'use client' import { motion } from 'framer-motion' import { Lightbulb, Zap, TrendingUp, Award, Leaf, Users } from 'lucide-react' const suggestionsData = [ { icon: Zap, title: 'High-Demand Foods', description: 'NGOs are requesting fresh vegetables. You have surplus from today's inventory.', action: 'View Match', color: 'from-emerald-500/20 to-teal-500/20', }, { icon: TrendingUp, title: 'Donation Streak', description: 'You're on a 14-day streak! Reach 30 days for a community badge.', action: 'View Badges', color: 'from-purple-500/20 to-pink-500/20', }, { icon: Award, title: 'Partner Rewards', description: 'Earn loyalty points with every donation. Redeem for tax benefits.', action: 'See Benefits', color: 'from-orange-500/20 to-red-500/20', }, ] export function SmartSuggestions() { return (
{suggestionsData.map((suggestion, index) => { const Icon = suggestion.icon return (

{suggestion.title}

{suggestion.description}

{suggestion.action} →
) })}
) } export function ImpactSection() { return (
{/* Impact Stats */}

Total Impact

2,840 kg

Food saved from waste

{/* Lives Helped */}

Lives Impacted

3,420+

People helped so far

{/* CO2 Saved */}

Carbon Offset

2.84 t CO₂

Equivalent to 1 tree/year

{/* Motivational Message */}

Your Impact This Month

You're Making a Difference!

Your donations have helped {Math.floor(Math.random() * 500 + 200)} people this month. Keep up the amazing work and help us build a more sustainable community.

Share Impact
) }
